overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from The Witcher 3 showing Geralt exploring a medieval stone fortress at dusk. The character walks through cobblestone courtyards, passes through a large wooden gate, navigates narrow stone corridors illuminated by torchlight, and approaches a distant windmill. The environment features historic stone architecture with atmospheric blue-hour lighting mixed with warm artificial light sources.

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the open courtyard toward the gate structure ahead

crumbling stone wall with wooden scaffolding attached
collapsed stone building with broken archways
rickety wooden construction scaffolding against the wall
overgrown grass and weeds between cobblestones

segments.scene_description: The segment opens in a wide, open courtyard of a ruined stone fortress during blue hour. The character walks forward on cobblestone paths between weathered stone walls, approaching a distant gate structure. Sparse vegetation grows between the stones, and wooden scaffolding clings to the right wall.

entering the darker interior of the gate passage

warm orange torchlight illuminating the stone archway
thick stone arch framing the wooden gate
weathered wooden doors opening to reveal the courtyard beyond

segments.scene_description: The character approaches a massive wooden gate structure with warm torchlight illuminating the stone archway. Passing through the gate doors, the lighting shifts from natural dusk to the dim interior of the gate passage before emerging on the other side.

events.description: exiting the gate into an open courtyard with a large ancient tree
descending stone steps along the fortress wall

round stone watchtower with crenellations
distant castle walls visible on the horizon
worn stone steps leading down to the lower level

segments.scene_description: Exiting the gate, the scene opens into a courtyard dominated by a massive ancient tree on the left. The character walks along a stone wall path, passing a round watchtower and descending worn stone steps toward a lower level of the fortress.

events.description: entering narrow passage beneath overhead stone bridge
passing a burning brazier mounted on the stone wall

agents.ego_description: navigating the narrow enclosed passage under the bridge, passing torch-lit braziers

entered.detail: thick stone bridge or walkway passing overhead, blocking the sky
iron brazier with burning fire providing warm orange light

segments.scene_description: The path narrows into an enclosed passage beneath a stone bridge overhead. The sky is mostly blocked, and the lighting becomes dimmer. The character passes burning braziers mounted on the walls, casting flickering orange light on the cobblestones.

scene_state.functional_zone: stone corridor with arches and burning torches

events.description: passing through stone archway into torch-lit corridor
emerging from corridor to see distant windmill against the sky

agents.ego_description: walking through the narrow stone corridor, approaching an archway with a windmill visible beyond

entered.detail: gothic stone archway framing the corridor exit
wooden windmill silhouette visible on the horizon against the blue sky

segments.scene_description: The character moves through a narrow stone corridor illuminated by wall-mounted torches. Passing through a stone archway, the scene opens slightly to reveal a distant windmill on the horizon, visible against the darkening blue sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: wooden corridor leading to inner keep

events.description: entering dark wooden corridor with stone walls

agents.ego_description: approaching and entering the dark wooden corridor, ascending wooden stairs

dark wooden planking forming the corridor walls
wooden steps leading upward into the structure

segments.scene_description: The final segment shows the character entering a dark wooden corridor built against the stone walls. The windmill fades from view as the character ascends wooden stairs into the dimly lit interior passage, transitioning from stone to wooden architecture.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a ruined stone fortress that transitions from an open, dusk-lit courtyard into a dim, enclosed passage. It begins by tracking the character across wide cobblestone paths and weathered walls under the blue hour sky, moving steadily toward a distant gate. As the character passes through the massive wooden gate, the lighting shifts from natural twilight to the warm, flickering glow of torchlight within the stone archway. The scene then opens into a second courtyard featuring a massive ancient tree and a round watchtower, before the camera follows a descent down worn stone steps toward a lower level. Finally, the environment narrows into a shadowed passage beneath a stone bridge, where the open sky vanishes and the path is illuminated only by burning braziers casting orange light on the stones.

The shot follows a continuous movement from a torchlit stone corridor into a dark, enclosed wooden interior. It begins with the character navigating a narrow stone passage illuminated by wall-mounted torches, moving forward until a stone archway opens the view to a distant windmill against a darkening blue sky. As the character continues forward, the open horizon fades from view while the environment shifts from cold stone to dark wood. The scene finally transitions into a dimly lit interior passage as the camera ascends wooden stairs, leaving the outdoor atmosphere behind for the enclosed architecture of the fortress.
